creator: inbox@alleghenycomputer.com
text:
(In reply to tech-lists from comment #2)
My firefox after about the 5 seconds or so that you reported actually takes me to a page that says "you must be logged in to access... bla bla" and then I get the login screen.  However, sometimes I get... your tab has crashed.

All of it making me things something is up with the URLs.  Maybe somebody upstream accidentally password protected the directory or file.  I don't know... just guessing...
